critical_issues.title: Validation test can pass without proving any staging acceptance criterion was actually met
critical_issues.recommendation: Add verification against machine-readable staging evidence and assert duration<=60s, blob path for run date, all five key events, metric range 24..28, no valid-run alerts, and deliberate-failure alert within 5 minutes.

suggestions.title: Checklist-content test missed two acceptance criteria phrases
suggestions.recommendation: Assert checklist includes criteria for successful execution within 60 seconds and no failure/data-quality alerts during valid run.

suggestions.title: Exact long-string assertions are brittle
suggestions.recommendation: Prefer semantic checks; at minimum add machine-readable evidence artifact checks to reduce dependence on editorial phrasing.
